summary: Tested mandatory registration fields feature. All 4 fields (Full Name, Email, WhatsApp, Home Address) are correctly displayed in the Details step with required asterisks. Backend API validates and stores email/address in orders and subscribers collections. 8/9 backend tests passed, 1 minor issue with email format validation.

minor.issue: CreateOrderRequest model uses 'str' instead of 'EmailStr' for email field - accepts invalid email formats like 'invalid-email'
minor.fix: Change 'email: str' to 'email: EmailStr' in CreateOrderRequest model (line 351 in server.py)

action_items: OPTIONAL: Change email field type from 'str' to 'EmailStr' in CreateOrderRequest model for backend validation (frontend already validates)
test_credentials: Phone: Any 10-digit Indian number starting with 6-9 (e.g., 9876543210). Sandbox OTP auto-returned.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mandatory registration fields feature fully implemented and tested. All 4 fields (Full Name, Email, WhatsApp, Home Address) work correctly. Minor enhancement: backend could use EmailStr for email validation.

mandatory_fields_ui.whatsapp_field: PASS - Disabled field showing verified phone

form_validation.button_disabled_when_empty: PASS - Proceed button disabled until all fields filled
form_validation.button_enabled_when_filled: PASS - Button enables after filling all fields
form_validation.frontend_email_validation: PASS - Validates email format before submission

backend_api.create_order_with_all_fields: PASS - Creates order with name, email, address
backend_api.order_stores_email_address: PASS - Email and address stored in orders collection
backend_api.subscriber_stores_email_address: PASS - Email and address stored in subscribers collection
backend_api.membership_returns_email_address: PASS - GET /api/membership/{phone} returns email and address
